_comment: TRADE-CALL-ROUTING-RESOLVER-W1 — public INPUT-shape snapshot for the MCP tools rewired through resolveMarketRoute. SANCTIONED NON-ADDITIVE EXCEPTION (architect A1, 2026-06-09): get_trade_call + its get_trade_signal alias DROP the Zod `default` on `timeframe` ('15m') and `exchange` ('BINANCE') so the shared resolver can distinguish a named venue/timeframe (-> perp) from a bare call (-> equity-universe routing). Runtime behavior is PRESERVED — omitting them still yields 15m / BINANCE, applied by resolveMarketRoute. These are the ONLY two non-additive key losses permitted this wave; every other input change is additive (new optional params). No tool added / removed / renamed; tools/list stays 9.

get_trade_call.effective_defaults_preserved_in: src/lib/market-route.ts resolveMarketRoute (timeframe -> 15m, exchange -> BINANCE) — existing callers unaffected at runtime
get_trade_call.x402: UNCHANGED — get_trade_call free/un-gated (/x402/get_trade_call -> 404); the get_trade_signal alias stays gated at $0.02

get_equity_call.back_compat: symbol-only callers behave exactly as before (daily-bar equity 1d); a supplied venue/timeframe routes to the perp engine via the resolver

regime_pair_status: get_market_regime + get_equity_regime UNCHANGED this wave (R3 DEFERRED -> OPS-TRADE-CALL-ROUTING-REGIME-W{NEXT}); regime engines diverge materially (equity regime has no timeframe; crypto regime enum is only 1h/4h/1d)

routing_contract.engine: 'perp' | 'equity' — resolveMarketRoute (single-derivation; both get_trade_call and get_equity_call dispatch through it, so the model picking either yields the contract-correct engine)
routing_contract.rule: assetClass forces the engine; else a named crypto venue OR a named timeframe -> perp; else bare -> equity if the ticker is in the Databento universe, else perp BINANCE 15m
routing_contract.default_perp_venue: BINANCE for ALL symbols (venueDefault) — name an exchange to target a specific listing (e.g. BITGET for a tokenized stock)
routing_contract.miss_path: an unlisted perp on the resolved venue -> the engine's standard not-found error (TradFiSymbolUnsupportedOnVenueError carrying suggestedVenues for known tokenized stocks)
routing_contract.membership_source: the existing equity-universe check (getUniverseEntry) via a lazy TTL cache (isEquityUniverseSymbol); fail-open -> perp

additive_only_assertion: Every input change is additive EXCEPT the 2 sanctioned get_trade_call default-key removals documented above. tools/list stays 9; no rename -> no client cache-refresh notice required.
consumers: x402 HTTP twin POST /x402/get_trade_signal (perp-only, schema UNCHANGED — does not share the Zod schema)
cache_contract: clients cache tools/list at session start — additive optional params + reworded descriptions need NO cache-refresh notice (no add/remove/rename)
drift_check_command: curl -s https://api.algovault.com/capabilities | jq '.tools | length'   # must == 9. Then POST /mcp tools/list (3-step handshake) and assert get_trade_call.inputSchema.properties includes 'assetClass' with required==['coin'], and get_equity_call.inputSchema.properties includes 'exchange' + 'timeframe'.
